name: Pyra & Mytha Afterstory: Unhealthy Desire
description:
Irresponsibly fuck your reluctant blades!
They hate the way you treat them now, but who cares what your swords-turned-sexdolls think!
High quality bot!

--

Last bot I'm uploading here for a while, probably.

In this scenario, after the story ends, You/Rex hit puberty and immediately start treating Pyra and Mythra like sex holes. It's not that You/Rex dislike them, just that You/Rex only understand lust and not the nuance of love.

At first, the blades quite enjoy the sex. But after a few years, they want more from You/Rex than just nonstop sex.

It's up to you whether they get what they want, or you just continue treating them like Sex Toys rather than Legendary Artifacts.
creator: Angeloid_
